title: Pearto Food Item
description: replace the boring apple with the awesome sauce pearto
body:
# Let there be pearto !!1!!

i will likely not update this pack to more versions, i have a bigger project coming soon and i'll be improving this pack's features and adding them as part of that larger project so watch out for that, likely coming before 2026

replaces the apple item with PEARTO !!!!!!!!!!

also replaces the golden and enchanted variants of the apple with much superior golden PEARTO and enchanted golden PEARTO !!!!!!!!

_yes i did in fact make an entire pear and golden pear texture that i will never release separately_
